name: address-volunteered-at-logo-step-saved-not-lost
description: User at WEB_COLLECT_LOGO types their address ('Address zamzama road karachi') instead of uploading a logo or replying skip. Bot must side-channel the address into contactAddress AND stay at WEB_COLLECT_LOGO to keep asking for the logo. Earlier behavior: side-channel LLM returned unclear, the bot replied 'I didn't catch an image', and the address was lost — even though the user explicitly prefixed it with the word 'Address'. Strengthened the side-channel prompt to be more generous on contact_update detection (explicit label patterns + street/road/sector keyword + place name = address).
